race.comment: SCATHINGLY (7) finally put it all together at start ten when he sped to the front for a slick victory over 1000m at Tamworth with the 59kg. Finds a fairly average C1 and can go on with it today. MIDNIGHT RABBLE (12) finally draws a good gate after he had genuine excuses last start with a tiring fifth from the outside barrier over 1100m at Narromine. Earlier efforts were sound and his best figures measure up nicely. Looms as the main danger. SIMPLY BETTER (11) was not that far away two back, then motored late from back in the field with a game second over 1000m at Tamworth. Tough draw today and can take a hand in the finish. SNATCHREILLY (1) tough gelding who always gives his all with the big weights. Showed a ton of grit when he sat on the fast tempo to secure third over 1000m at Tamworth first-up. Gets a more economical run today and don't dismiss with the claim.
